mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.novel_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at, CASE WHEN u.id IS NULL THEN '탈퇴된 회원' ELSE u.nickname END AS author_nickname, CASE WHEN u.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE u.profile_image_url END AS author_profile_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_likes rl WHERE rl.review_id = r.id) AS like_count FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE novel_id = #{novelId}

SELECT r.id, r.novel_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at, n.title AS novel_title, n.cover_image_url AS novel_cover_image_url FROM reviews r JOIN novels n ON r.novel_id = n.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, novel_id, user_id, rating, content, created_at, updated_at FROM reviews WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (novel_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{novelId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
